name: Bronckhorst (Netherlands)
description: A white field bearing the municipal logo — a blue leaping hare and a magenta tower — with the name 'gemeente Bronckhorst'.
history: Flag of the municipality of Bronckhorst in the province of Gelderland, formed in 2005. The flag is the municipality's logo/wordmark banner rather than a heraldic design.

features.role: the municipal logo (a blue hare and magenta tower) and wordmark 'gemeente Bronckhorst'
